items.headline: MiSTer Companion v3.7.0 Released
items.message:
MiSTer Companion v3.7.0 is now available.

This release adds MiSTer OpenBOR 7533 and MiSTer OpenBOR 4086 to the Extras tab, allowing you to install or uninstall them directly from MiSTer Companion.

The Update_All configurator now includes MiSTer Frontier as a community source.

MiSTer Settings has also been improved with a fix for extra blank lines appearing when switching between Easy and Advanced mode, plus updated analogue video presets including a new RGB (PVM/BVM SoG Alt) option and improved VGA Monitor behavior.

An official macOS 13+ Intel binary is also now available.

You can download the latest stable release below.

items.headline: Help Bring MiSTer Companion to macOS
items.message:
macOS support is now being actively worked on, with recent improvements contributed by DoggyChicken.

To continue improving and properly maintain macOS support long-term, having access to a Mac for development and testing is still essential. At the moment, I rely on community contributions and am unable to test macOS-specific changes directly.

If you'd like to help make this possible, consider supporting the Ko-fi goal below.
